title: Driver and Device Troubleshooting
description: Collect problem-device, driver, and event evidence for hardware or driver issues before recommending safe next steps.
starter_prompt: Troubleshoot driver or device problems with read-only evidence first.

phases.prompt: Identify device class, recent changes, and whether rollback/update guidance is needed. Keep execution read-only.

arguments.command: $ErrorActionPreference='Continue'; function Section($n){ Write-Output ('== ' + $n + ' ==') }; Section 'Problem devices'; Get-PnpDevice -PresentOnly -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Status -ne 'OK' } | Select-Object Class,FriendlyName,InstanceId,Status,Problem | Format-List; Section 'Recent driver inventory'; Get-CimInstance Win32_PnPSignedDriver | Select-Object DeviceName,DriverVersion,DriverProviderName,DriverDate,InfName | Sort-Object DriverDate -Descending | Select-Object -First 80 | Format-Table -AutoSize; Section 'Device setup events'; Get-WinEvent -FilterHashtable @{LogName='Microsoft-Windows-DriverFrameworks-UserMode/Operational'; StartTime=(Get-Date).AddDays(-14)} -MaxEvents 80 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object TimeCreated,Id,ProviderName,Message | Format-List

phases.prompt: Collect read-only problem-device, signed-driver, and recent device event evidence.
Analyze device and driver evidence. Identify likely driver class, confidence, safe vendor/OEM next steps, and rollback/update risks.
Check that recommendations are evidence-backed and do not instruct blind driver installs or unsafe unsigned driver changes.

Create a technician and customer-ready handoff report with evidence, findings, actions/tools used, verification status, artifacts/logs, cleanup status, residual risk, and prioritized follow-up next actions.
Keep logs and reports. Remove only workflow-created scratch files.

acceptance_criteria: Problem-device and signed-driver evidence are captured.
Recommendations identify risk and vendor/OEM source expectations.
No driver installation or removal runs without a separate explicit workflow.
Final report includes evidence, actions, cleanup status, risks, and follow-up items.
